opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Elk HVAC has no booking tool, no contact form, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours cannot book, so leads go to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling widget to capture and confirm HVAC appointments 24/7 automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 98 Google reviews at 4.7 stars with zero detected owner responses on the profile.
opportunities.observation: Skipping responses signals neglect and leaves reputation-building value on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized review replies using AI trained on HVAC service language and tone.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring service signals on the website.
opportunities.observation: Boise's seasonal HVAC demand means past customers go dormant between heating and cooling seasons.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal tune-up reminders via SMS and email to convert past jobs into recurring revenue.
